cards.rulesText: Can move as if the top and bottom edges of the realm were connected.

cards.name: Polar Explorers
cards.rulesText: Allied units here can move as if the top and bottom edges of the realm were connected.

cards.name: Porcupine Pufferfish
cards.rulesText: Lethal, Submerge

cards.name: Ruler of Thul
cards.rulesText:
Charge

Allies can move as if the top and bottom edges of the realm were connected. Other allies occupying sites there have +1 power.

cards.name: Sea Raider
cards.rulesText: Whenever Sea Raider attacks and kills an enemy, its controller discards their topmost spell. You may cast that spell once this turn, ignoring threshold.

cards.name: Sea Serpent
cards.rulesText: Submerge, Waterbound

cards.name: Sedge Crabs
cards.rulesText: Can only move themselves sideways.

cards.name: Seirawan Hydra
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Immediately heals from damage that doesn't kill it.

cards.name: Selfsame Simulacrum
cards.rulesText: May be summoned as a basic copy of a nearby minion.

cards.name: Sneak Thief
cards.rulesText:
Stealth

Tap → Steal an artifact out of the hands of another target unit here, and stay Stealthed.

cards.name: Swan Maidens
cards.rulesText: Airborne, Submerge

cards.name: Tide Naiads
cards.rulesText:
Submerge

This site is flooded. It is a water site.

cards.name: Tringh Constrictor
cards.rulesText: Tap → Tringh Constrictor may take a step, then it constricts target minion here and carries it disabled. The next time Tringh Constrictor would untap, it instead kills that minion if it's still constricted.

cards.name: Tufted Turtles
cards.rulesText: The first time Tuft Turtles would take damage each turn, prevent that damage.

cards.name: Unland Angler
cards.rulesText:
Submerge

At the start of your turn, if Unland Angler is submerged, force each enemy minion atop adjacent sites to take a step toward this one.

cards.name: Unland Eel
cards.rulesText:
Submerge

Whenever Unland Eel submerges, it may drag another minion here down with it.

cards.name: Yokai Kappas
cards.rulesText: Discard a water site → Untap Yokai Kappas. Use only once per turn.

cards.name: Dodge Roll
cards.rulesText:
May be cast when an ally is attacked.

An attacked ally may move to another adjacent location to evade the attack.

cards.name: Drown
cards.rulesText: Submerge target minion or artifact, if able.

cards.name: Extinguish
cards.rulesText: Banish all fire minions and fire auras occupying target site up to two steps away.

cards.name: Fire Harpoons!
cards.rulesText: Deal 1 damage to target minion above or below an adjacent Water site and pull it to the caster's location. Draw a card.

cards.name: Font of Life
cards.rulesText: Each ally heals an amount equal to the number of sites in its body of water.

cards.name: Frost Nova
cards.rulesText: Freeze nearby enemy minions. They're disabled until your next turn.

cards.name: Geyser
cards.rulesText: This turn, flood target site and give each minion there Airborne. Draw a card.

cards.name: Ice Lance
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Shoot a piercing projectile. Deal 3, then 2, then 1 damage to up to one hit unit at each of the first three locations along its path.

cards.name: Marine Voyage
cards.rulesText: This turn, your units can move between any sites in a chosen body of water as if they were adjacent.

cards.name: Plague of Frogs
cards.rulesText: Summon seven Frog tokens.

cards.name: Pollimorph
cards.rulesText: Transform target nearby minion into a Frog token.

cards.name: Replication
cards.rulesText: Conjure a copy of an artifact carried by the caster.

cards.name: Riptide
cards.rulesText: Target water site pulls in an aboveground unit it's adjacent to. Draw a card.

cards.name: Shrink
cards.rulesText: Set the base power of target nearby unit to 0 until your next turn.

cards.name: Sleep
cards.rulesText: Target minion at a location up to two steps away falls asleep. It's disabled until it takes damage.

cards.name: Stormy Seas
cards.rulesText: Submerge all minions and artifacts occupying target water site.

cards.name: Twist of Fate
cards.rulesText: Exchange life totals with target opponent. (X) is the difference between your life totals.

cards.name: Upwelling
cards.rulesText: Target a nearby site. Return each artifact and minion there to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Wrath of the Sea
cards.rulesText: Flood all sites adjacent to a body of water this turn. Then submerge all minions and artifacts on water.

cards.name: Abundance
cards.rulesText: Each affected site provides one additional mana.

cards.name: Atlantean Fate
cards.rulesText:
Affected non-Ordinary sites are flooded. They are water sites, only provide Water threshold, and lose all other abilities.

Genesis → Submerge all minions and artifacts atop affected sites.

cards.name: Blizzard
cards.rulesText:
Affected sites and units atop them can't be attacked or intercepted.

At the start of your turn, dispel Blizzard.

cards.name: Flood
cards.rulesText: Affected sites are flooded. They're water sites.

cards.name: Mariner's Curse
cards.rulesText: Whenever a minion enters an affected water site, submerge it and return Mariner's Curse to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Silence
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Minions occupying affected sites are silenced.

cards.name: Wall of Ice
cards.rulesText:
Conjure atop the border of a site you control.

Units can't traverse Wall of Ice on the ground.

cards.name: All-terrain Vestments
cards.rulesText: Bearer has Burrowing, Submerge, and Voidwalk, if it's a minion.

cards.name: Amethyst Core
cards.rulesText: Provides (A) and ① to its controller.

cards.name: Angel's Egg
cards.rulesText: At the end of each turn, the controller of Angel's Egg's site heals 1 life.

cards.name: Aquamarine Core
cards.rulesText: Provides (W) and ① to its controller.

cards.name: Battering Ram
cards.rulesText: Units here have “Tap → Destroy target adjacent Wall or Monument.”

cards.name: Belfry
cards.rulesText: At the end of your turn, untap all nearby allies.

cards.name: Black Obelisk
cards.rulesText: Black Obelisk's site has “At the start of your turn, lose 2 life and gain ② this turn.”

cards.name: Blasted Oak
cards.rulesText: If a spell or non-basic ability can target—in order of precedence—Blasted Oak, its site or location, or anything else at its site or location, it must.

cards.name: Buried Treasure
cards.rulesText:
If cast, conjure this under an allied land site of an opponent's choice.

When Buried Treasure is carried to the surface, its controller sacrifices it and draws two cards.

cards.name: Chains of Prometheus
cards.rulesText: Whenever a player draws a card, that player taps their strongest untapped minion.

cards.name: Crave Golem
cards.rulesText: At the start of each player's turn, Crave Golem attacks a random minion within its range of motion, or takes a step toward the closest minion if it can't.

cards.name: Crown of the Victor
cards.rulesText: Bearer has +3 power if they've ever killed a minion.

cards.name: Devil's Egg
cards.rulesText: At the end of each turn, the controller of Devil's Egg's site loses 1 life.

cards.name: Doomsday Device
cards.rulesText:
Doomsday Device enters the realm with 6 counters. At the end of each player’s turn, remove a counter. When the last is removed, it detonates!

Deals damage to each unit at affected locations:

cards.name: Drums of Doom
cards.rulesText: Damage dealt to minions nearby is lethal.

cards.name: Erik's Curiosa
cards.rulesText: Rip Erik's Curiosa to pieces → Draw a card from your collection.

cards.name: Flaming Sword
cards.rulesText: Bearer has +1 power, and its strikes splash full damage to each other enemy at a struck unit's location.

cards.name: Gilded Aegis
cards.rulesText: If bearer is a minion and would die, instead fully heal it and banish Gilded Aegis.

cards.name: Iron Shackles
cards.rulesText:
May be conjured to target enemy minion.

Bearer is disabled.

cards.name: Kythera Mechanism
cards.rulesText: Bearer's controller determines all random outcomes.

cards.name: Land Deed
cards.rulesText: Bearer has “You control this site.”

cards.name: Lucky Charm
cards.rulesText: Bearer's controller has “Whenever you would determine an outcome at random, determine it an extra time and choose one.”

cards.name: Maddening Bells
cards.rulesText: Spells cast by a nearby Spellcaster cost ② more to cast.

cards.name: Magellan Globe
cards.rulesText: Opposite edges of the realm are connected.

cards.name: Magnetic Muzzle
cards.rulesText:
UPDATED: Bearer is silenced and can't drop Magnetic Muzzle.

At the end of each player’s turn, if Magnetic Muzzle is abandoned, that player attaches it to a nearby minion.

cards.name: Mask of Mayhem
cards.rulesText:
UPDATED: Whenever a nearby minion can attack, it must.

Nearby strikes against units deal double damage.

cards.name: Mix Aer
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice Mix Aer → This turn, bearer's next Air spell requires no threshold and costs ③ less to cast.

cards.name: Mix Aqua
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice Mix Aqua → This turn, bearer's next Water spell requires no threshold and costs ③ less to cast.

cards.name: Mix Ignis
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice Mix Ignis → This turn, bearer's next Fire spell requires no threshold and costs ③ less to cast.

cards.name: Mix Terra
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice Mix Terra → This turn, bearer's next Earth spell requires no threshold and costs ③ less to cast.

cards.name: Onyx Core
cards.rulesText: Provides (E) and ① to its controller.

cards.name: Orb of Ba'al Berith
cards.rulesText: The first time each turn a Magic spell is cast nearby, Orb of Ba'al Berith creates a copy. The spell's controller may choose new targets.

cards.name: Payload Trebuchet
cards.rulesText: Tap bearer and another ally here, Discard a card → Deal damage equal to the discarded card's mana cost to each unit at target location up to three steps away.

cards.name: Pendulum of Peril
cards.rulesText: At the end of each player's turn, Pendulum of Peril kills all minions at its current location and another adjacent location of that player's choice.

cards.name: Philosopher's Stone
cards.rulesText: The first spell of each element cast by the bearer each turn costs ① less.

cards.name: Pnakotic Manuscript
cards.rulesText: Bearer has “Tap → Reveal your topmost spell and draw it. Bearer takes damage equal to that card's cost.”

cards.name: Poisonous Dagger
cards.rulesText: Bearer has Lethal.

cards.name: Purge Juggernaut
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: At the start of your turn, Purge Juggernaut taps and moves to an adjacent location. Kill all other minions there.

cards.name: Rolling Boulder
cards.rulesText: Units here have “Tap → Give Rolling Boulder a push. It rolls as far as possible and deals 4 damage to each other unit along its path.”

cards.name: Ruby Core
cards.rulesText: Provides (F) and ① to its controller.

cards.name: Scarecrow
cards.rulesText:
Genesis → Return each Airborne minion here to its owner’s hand.

 Airborne minions can't enter this location.

cards.name: Screaming Skull
cards.rulesText: Whenever bearer attacks and kills an enemy, it untaps.

cards.name: Seven-League Boots
cards.rulesText: Bearer has Movement +7.

cards.name: Siege Ballista
cards.rulesText: Tap bearer and another ally here → Deal 3 damage to target unit up to two steps away.

cards.name: Spear of Destiny
cards.rulesText: Bearer has “Tap → Throw Spear of Destiny at any minion anywhere. It teleports to that minion’s location and kills it.”

cards.name: Sunken Treasure
cards.rulesText:
If cast, conjure this under an allied water site of an opponent's choice.

When Sunken Treasure is carried to the surface, its controller sacrifices it and draws two cards.

cards.name: The Immortal Throne
cards.rulesText:
Whenever anyone plays a card with cost equal to the number of level counters on The Immortal Throne, they draw a card and add a level counter.

At level 8 or more, an Avatar here alone wins the game.

cards.name: Torshammar Trinket
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Bearer has +1 power. After each turn, return this to its owner’s hand.

cards.name: Truesight Crossbow
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Bearer has Ranged and can see stealthed enemies.

cards.name: Undertaker Engine
cards.rulesText: At the end of your turn, you may burrow and/or unburrow any combination of artifacts and minions at this site.

cards.name: Wicker Manikin
cards.rulesText: Non-fire Spellcaster

cards.name: Wings of Invention
cards.rulesText: Bearer has Airborne and Movement +1, if it's a minion.

cards.name: Cloud City
cards.rulesText: (A)(A)(A) — Once on your turn, this site may fly to a nearby void.

cards.name: Dark Tower
cards.rulesText: Genesis → If this is the only Dark Tower you control, gain ① this turn.

cards.name: Gothic Tower
cards.rulesText: Genesis → If this is the only Gothic Tower you control, gain ① this turn.

cards.name: Lone Tower
cards.rulesText: Genesis → If this is the only Lone Tower you control, gain ① this turn.

cards.name: Mountain Pass
cards.rulesText: Minions can't enter this site on the ground if there's already a minion atop.

cards.name: Observatory
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next three spells. Put them back in any order.

cards.name: Updraft Ridge
cards.rulesText: UPDATED: Airborne minions atop Updraft Ridge move freely away.

cards.name: Watchtower
cards.rulesText: Enemy units atop nearby sites permanently lose Stealth.

cards.name: Bedrock
cards.rulesText: Can't be moved, destroyed, or modified.

cards.name: Gnome Hollows
cards.rulesText: Units with 3 or more power can’t enter this site.

cards.name: Holy Ground
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Each nearby Avatar heals 3 life.

cards.name: Humble Village
cards.rulesText: Genesis → You may pay ① to summon a Foot Soldier token here.

cards.name: Kingdom of Agartha
cards.rulesText: (E)(E)(E) — All minions have Burrowing.

cards.name: Pillar of Zeiros
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Banish all dead minions, and you heal 1 life for each.

cards.name: Quagmire
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Until your next turn, units are Immobile while they occupy nearby sites.

cards.name: Rift Valley
cards.rulesText: You may pull apart a partial row or column to make a void in which to play this.

cards.name: Rustic Village
cards.rulesText: Genesis → You may pay ① to summon a Foot Soldier token here.

cards.name: Secret Tunnel
cards.rulesText: Burrowed allies can move as if this were adjacent to your other sites.

cards.name: Simple Village
cards.rulesText: Genesis → You may pay ① to summon a Foot Soldier token here.

cards.name: Vantage Hills
cards.rulesText: Ranged units atop this site have +1 range.

cards.name: Arid Desert
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Deal 1 damage to each minion atop target nearby site.

cards.name: Dwarven Forge
cards.rulesText: Anyone may conjure Weapons and Armor here, and for ① less.

cards.name: Mirage
cards.rulesText: When played, you may return a site in play you own to your hand to play this site in its place.

cards.name: Red Desert
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Deal 1 damage to each minion atop target nearby site.

cards.name: Remote Desert
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Deal 1 damage to each minion atop target nearby site.

cards.name: River of Flame
cards.rulesText: Fire Spellcaster

cards.name: Shifting Sands
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Reactivate the Genesis abilities of your nearby Deserts.

cards.name: Smokestacks of Gnaak
cards.rulesText: Other nearby sites lose their abilities.

cards.name: Vesuvius
cards.rulesText: (F)(F)(F) — Sacrifice Vesuvius → Each unit occupying nearby sites takes 3 damage.

cards.name: Autumn River
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook.

cards.name: Floodplain
cards.rulesText: Once on your turn, you may flood an adjacent site this turn.

cards.name: Iceberg
cards.rulesText: Minions occupying nearby sites can't submerge or surface.

cards.name: Island Leviathan
cards.rulesText: (W)(W)(W)(W)(W)(W)(W)(W) — May transform into a Monster. Place flooded Rubble underneath.

cards.name: Maelström
cards.rulesText: At the start of your turn, you may pull in each minion in this body of water one step.

cards.name: Spring River
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook.

cards.name: Summer River
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook.

cards.name: Tadpole Pool
cards.rulesText: (W)(W)(W) — Genesis → Summon three submerged Frog tokens here.

cards.name: Undertow
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Staying within this body of water, move target unit one step.

cards.name: Pristine Paradise
cards.rulesText: Provides no mana or threshold unless completely empty.

cards.name: The Colour Out of Space
cards.rulesText: Provides no mana or threshold if not adjacent to the void.

cards.name: Astral Alcazar
cards.rulesText: Units can move between this site and any void as if they were adjacent.

cards.name: Battlefield
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Conjure a broken Weapon or Armor here.

cards.name: Boneyard
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Each player may summon a minion from their cemetery here.

cards.name: Bottomless Pit
cards.rulesText: Whenever a non-Airborne minion enters this site, kill it.

cards.name: Cornerstone
cards.rulesText: You may play this site to any corner.

cards.name: Crossroads
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next four sites. Put three on the bottom of your atlas.

cards.name: Dome of Osiros
cards.rulesText: This site and minions here can't be attacked.

cards.name: Donnybrook Inn
cards.rulesText: Anyone may cast minions here and they may do so for ① less.

cards.name: Edge of the World
cards.rulesText: Must always be adjacent to the void.

cards.name: Free City
cards.rulesText: Once per turn, may attack or defend against enemy units here.

cards.name: Great Wall
cards.rulesText: Enemy units can’t move through this site’s top border on the ground.

cards.name: Imperial Road
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Target opponent, then you, may play a site adjacent to this one.

cards.name: Mirror Realm
cards.rulesText: This site enters the realm as a copy of another nearby site.

cards.name: Mudflow
cards.rulesText: At the start of your turn, surface or unburrow each minion occupying target site nearby.

cards.name: Planar Gate
cards.rulesText: Minions here can traverse the void, gaining Voidwalk until leaving it.

cards.name: Primordial Spring
cards.rulesText: Genesis → If you control fewer sites than any opponent, draw three sites.

cards.name: Roots of Yggdrasil
cards.rulesText: When the Roots of Yggdrasil are destroyed, destroy everything.

cards.name: Sinkhole
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice Sinkhole → Destroy a nearby site.

cards.name: Standing Stones
cards.rulesText: Minions here are Spellcasters.

cards.name: The Geistwood
cards.rulesText: Genesis abilities here are also Deathrite abilities.

cards.name: Vaults of Zul
cards.rulesText: The first time an Avatar stops here, they draw three cards and skip their next turn.

cards.name: Avatar of Air
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Once on your turn, if you occupy an Air site, you may fly a unit atop it to a nearby site.

cards.name: Avatar of Earth
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

You have +1 power for each nearby earth site.

cards.name: Avatar of Fire
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Tap → This turn, fire sites in your hand are also Fireballs.

cards.name: Avatar of Water
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Tap → Flood a site adjacent to your body of water until you do so again. You may teleport there.

cards.name: Battlemage
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Whenever Battlemage attacks and kills an enemy, you may draw a spell.

cards.name: Deathspeaker
cards.rulesText:
UPDATED: Tap → Play or draw a site.

You may banish a dead minion each turn to cast a copy of it, and for (0) if you’re on Death’s Door. The copy enters the realm, uses its Genesis, then is banished.

cards.name: Elementalist
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

You have an additional (E)(F)(W)(A).

cards.name: Enchantress
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Whenever you cast a spell, you may animate target aura until your next turn. It’s an aura minion with power equal to its cost.

cards.name: Pathfinder
cards.rulesText:
Your atlas can’t contain duplicates. Draw no sites during setup.

Tap → If able, play the topmost site of your atlas to an adjacent location and move there.

cards.name: Seer
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

At the start of your turn, look at your topmost site or spell. You may put it on the bottom of its deck.

cards.name: Sorcerer
cards.rulesText:
Tap → Play or draw a site.

Tap → Draw a spell.

cards.name: Winter River
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Look at your next spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook.

cards.name: Rubble
cards.rulesText: Provides no mana.

cards.name: Frog (Blue)
cards.rulesText: Submerge

cards.name: Frog (Green)
cards.rulesText: Submerge

cards.name: Frog (Red)
cards.rulesText: Submerge

cards.name: Apprentice Wizard
cards.rulesText:
Spellcaster
Genesis → Draw a spell.

cards.name: Blood Ravens
cards.rulesText:
UPDATED: Airborne

Blood Ravens' strike damage against units heals you.

cards.name: Candlemas Monks
cards.rulesText: Deathrite → Proceed to the end phase.

cards.name: Cloud Spirit
cards.rulesText: Airborne, Movement +2

cards.name: Daperyll Vampire
cards.rulesText:
UPDATED: Airborne

Daperyll Vampire's strike damage against units heals you.

cards.name: Dead of Night Demon
cards.rulesText: Stealth

cards.name: East-West Dragon
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

Moves freely sideways.

cards.name: Grandmaster Wizard
cards.rulesText:
Spellcaster
Genesis → Draw three spells.

cards.name: Grim Reaper
cards.rulesText:
Lethal

Whenever Grim Reaper kills a minion, banish that minion and all copies. Search its owner's cemetery, hand, and spellbook and banish any copies. They shuffle.

cards.name: Gyre Hippogriffs
cards.rulesText: Airborne, Charge

cards.name: Haast Eagle
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

May carry a weaker allied minion.

cards.name: Headless Haunt
cards.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the start of your turn, Headless Haunt teleports to the top of a random site or void.

cards.name: Highland Clansmen
cards.rulesText: Charge

cards.name: Highland Falconer
cards.rulesText: Genesis → You may search your hand and spellbook for a Beast with Airborne and mana cost ② or less and summon it here. Shuffle if needed.

cards.name: Highland Princess
cards.rulesText: Genesis → Search your spellbook for an artifact that costs ① or less, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle.

cards.name: Hounds of Ondaros
cards.rulesText:
Airborne, Burrowing, Submerge, Voidwalk

Nearby enemies permanently lose Stealth.

cards.name: Kite Archer
cards.rulesText:
Ranged

Immediately after performing a ranged strike, Kite Archer may take a step.

cards.name: Lord of the Void
cards.rulesText:
Voidwalk

At the end of your turn, Lord of the Void may banish an adjacent site, unless there's an Avatar there.

cards.name: Men of Leng
cards.rulesText: Whenever Men of Leng strike an Avatar, that Avatar discards a random card.

cards.name: Midnight Rogue
cards.rulesText: Ranged, Stealth

cards.name: Moon Clan Werewolf
cards.rulesText: Sacrifice an allied Mortal → Summon Moon Clan Werewolf from your hand to the Mortal's location.

cards.name: Nightmare
cards.rulesText: At the end of your turn, for each enemy minion here, you may push it to an adjacent location or void.

cards.name: Nimbus Jinn
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

Discard a spell → Deal 3 damage to another random unit here.

cards.name: Palliburrie Bats
cards.rulesText: Airborne, Burrowing

cards.name: Peregrine Apparition
cards.rulesText: Airborne, Movement +3, Voidwalk

cards.name: Phantasmal Shade
cards.rulesText: When Phantasmal Shade is struck, destroy it.

cards.name: Phantom Steed
cards.rulesText:
Movement +2, Voidwalk

May carry an allied minion.

cards.name: Phase Assassin
cards.rulesText:
Voidwalk

Whenever Phase Assassin enters the void, he gains Stealth.

cards.name: Plumed Pegasus
cards.rulesText: Airborne

cards.name: Puppet Master
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Gain control of all tapped minions here until Puppet Master leaves the realm.

cards.name: Recurring Specter
cards.rulesText:
Can't defend.

May be cast from your cemetery.

cards.name: Riddle Sphinx
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

Genesis → Look at your topmost spell. You may put it on the bottom of your spellbook, then an opponent may exchange your top and bottommost spells. Draw a card.

cards.name: Roaming Monster
cards.rulesText: May be summoned to any site.

cards.name: Skirmishers of Mu
cards.rulesText:
Ranged

During basic movement, Skirmishers of Mu may perform a ranged strike from any location along their path.

cards.name: Sky Baron
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

All other minions lose Airborne.

cards.name: Sling Pixies
cards.rulesText:
Airborne, Ranged

Takes no damage from units with 4 or more power.

cards.name: Spectral Stalker
cards.rulesText: Voidwalk

cards.name: Spire Lich
cards.rulesText: If Spire Lich is atop a Tower, it has +2 power, Ranged, and Spellcaster.

cards.name: Ultimate Horror
cards.rulesText:
Airborne, Voidwalk

Genesis → Summon each other dead Voidwalk minion to a nearby site or void.

cards.name: Vril Revenant
cards.rulesText:
Voidwalk

① → Gain +1 power this turn.

cards.name: Wind Sylph
cards.rulesText:
Airborne, Air Spellcaster

After Wind Sylph casts a Magic spell, she may push a unit here one step.

cards.name: Witherwing Hero
cards.rulesText:
Airborne

Whenever a weaker allied minion here is attacked, you may return it to its owner's hand.

cards.name: Zephyranne Airship
cards.rulesText:
Airborne, Movement +2

May carry any number of allied minions.

cards.name: Blink
cards.rulesText: An ally teleports to a location it’s nearby. Draw a card.

cards.name: Browse
cards.rulesText: Look at your next seven spells. Put one in your hand and the rest on the bottom of your spellbook in any order.

cards.name: Chain Lightning
cards.rulesText: Deal 2 damage to target unit nearby. Any number of times, you may spend ② to additionally target a new unit nearby the previous one.

cards.name: Chaos Twister
cards.rulesText: Place target minion on the back of your hand, then blow it off from a height of at least one foot. Deal damage equal to its power to each unit atop the site it lands on, including itself.

cards.name: Disenchant
cards.rulesText: Destroy all auras and artifacts at target location up to two steps away.

cards.name: Dream-Quest
cards.rulesText: An allied Spellcaster falls asleep and is disabled until hurt. At the start of your next turn, if it's still asleep, you may wake it up to search your spellbook for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle if needed.

cards.name: Fade
